violations.description: Laundering of linens. — --Dirty linens found on shelving with food items. Linens should be laundered after use.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Chips found stored on the floor near the roller grill. Food should be stored 6 inches off of the floor.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towel dispenser was found empty during inspection. Paper towels should be available at all times.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Degreaser found on shelving above 3 compartment sink next to food storage containers. Chemicals should be stored separated from food and items used for food preparation.
